name: Infinitrack Mountain Smasher
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>無</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>む</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>限</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>起</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>動</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>どう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>コロッサルマウンテン
desc:
2 Level 7 monsters
When this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle: You can attach that monster to this card as material. You can only use each of the following effects of "Infinitrack Mountain Smasher" once per turn.
● You can detach 1 material from this card; it gains 1000 ATK.
● If this card is in your GY: You can Tribute 1 Machine Link Monster; Special Summon this card in Defense Position.

When this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle: You can attach that monster to this card as material. You can only use each of the following effects of "Infinitrack Mountain Smasher" once per turn.

action: Activates if it destroys a monster by battle
Attaches from your opponent's Graveyard as Xyz Material
Attaches from your opponent's Extra Deck as Xyz Material
Attaches your opponent's banished cards as Xyz Material
summoning: Does not require specific Xyz Materials
Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
